label: Upload to Storage
description: Upload a file (video, image, or document) to your extensiblecontent.com account storage. Returns a public URL that can be used in later workflow steps (e.g. Upload Post). Requires a logged-in backend account with an upgraded plan.

inputs.description: Row variable containing the file to upload — a data: URI, blob: URI, or a URL to fetch
Row variable for the filename (optional, auto-detected if empty)
Row variable for the content type / MIME (optional, auto-detected)
Row variable containing the project ID for storage organization (optional, falls back to defaultProjectId → Library default → 'default')

outputs.description: Row variable to store the public URL of the uploaded file
Row variable to store the file ID (useful for later deletion)

formSchema.label: File variable key
formSchema.hint: Row variable with a data: URI, blob: URI, or URL to fetch and upload.

formSchema.label: Filename variable key (optional)
formSchema.hint: Override filename. Auto-detected from URL if empty.

formSchema.label: Content type variable key (optional)
formSchema.hint: Override MIME type. Auto-detected if empty.

formSchema.label: Project ID variable key (optional)
formSchema.hint: Row variable for project ID. Falls back to defaultProjectId, Library default, then 'default'.

formSchema.label: Default project ID (optional)
formSchema.hint: Used when row has no projectId / _cfsProjectId.
